SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DIANA VOLLMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC, REPRESENTED BY MIKE RYAN, FIELD SUPERVISOR AND FINBAR BRODY, PRESIDENT ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. MR. BRODY STATES THAT THE CONTRACT THAT PRECISION ENGINEERING HAS WITH DEFENDANT CCSF INDEMNIFIES CCSF FROM ANY LIABILITY AND SHOULD BE DISMISSED FROM THIS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT CCSF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Set For Trial On Sep-02-20 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Diana Vollmer for respondents/plaintiffs is present;
Finbar Brody, President of Precision Engineering, Inc., for petitioners/defendants is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Finbar Brody testifies on behalf of Precision Engineering, Inc., petitioner/defendant. The following evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A(Group) - Folder with Summary/Claim/Calculations/Photos/Receipts/Notice/Neighbor Letters/Contacts.

Diana Volmer, respondent/plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1(Group) - Color photographs/Email/Asphalt Concrete Summary.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Felicia Greent; Not reported; Dept. 608.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Judgment Entered
